assertions.assertion: Explains that HttpContext is not available in Blazor Server circuits after the initial HTTP request
assertions.rationale: Explains that HttpContext is only available during the initial HTTP request and becomes null after the SignalR circuit is established.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddBlazorServerAccessTokenManagement<T>() with a custom IUserTokenStore implementation
assertions.rationale: Does not use AddBlazorServerAccessTokenManagement<T>(). Instead uses a custom scoped TokenProvider service with manual HttpContextAccessor-based token capture — not the Duende library's built-in Blazor Server support.

assertions.assertion: The custom IUserTokenStore implements GetTokenAsync, StoreTokenAsync, and ClearTokenAsync methods
assertions.rationale: Does not implement IUserTokenStore at all. Uses a simple TokenProvider POCO with AccessToken/RefreshToken properties, not the library's IUserTokenStore interface.

assertions.assertion: Shows capturing tokens during the OnTokenValidated OIDC event to persist them to the custom store
assertions.rationale: Captures tokens in App.razor/OnInitializedAsync via HttpContextAccessor.HttpContext.GetTokenAsync(), not in the OnTokenValidated OIDC event.
